name: ZScaler NssWebLog - Detect Web Traffic Blocked for Malicious Categories
xql_query:
datamodel dataset = zscaler_nssweblog_raw
| filter xdm.observer.action = "Block" and xdm.network.http.url_category in ("Suspicious Destination", "Anonymizing Proxy", "Malware", "Phishing/Scam", "Spyware/Adware")
| fields _time, xdm.source.user.username, xdm.source.ipv4, xdm.network.http.url, xdm.network.http.url_category, xdm.alert.name
description: This query finds all instances where a user attempted to access a website that Zscaler blocked because it belonged to a high-risk category like Malware, Phishing, or Spyware.
alert_name: ZScaler NssWebLog - Detect Web Traffic Blocked for Malicious Categories
